title: Cooking Dinner
sentences: Every evening, my mother cooks dinner.
She buys fresh vegetables at the market.
Today she is making soup and rice.
First, she washes the vegetables in water.
Then she cuts them into small pieces.
She puts the vegetables in a big pot.
The soup smells wonderful in the kitchen.
My father sets the table for dinner.
We all sit down together to eat.
The food is warm and very tasty.
After dinner, we wash the dishes together.
